title: User navigates to the 'GET CONNECTED' screen
test_steps: Open the fitness app. | Navigate to the 'GET CONNECTED' screen.

title: User clicks on the 'CONNECT APPS AND DEVICES' button
test_steps: Open the fitness app. | Navigate to the 'GET CONNECTED' screen. | Click on the 'CONNECT APPS AND DEVICES' button.
expected_result: The app transitions to the device and app connection screen.

title: User clicks on the 'SKIP AND FINISH SIGN UP' button
test_steps: Open the fitness app. | Navigate to the 'GET CONNECTED' screen. | Click on the 'SKIP AND FINISH SIGN UP' button.
expected_result: The user is directed to the sign-up completion screen.

title: User skips the 'GET CONNECTED' screen
test_steps: Open the fitness app. | Click on the 'SKIP AND FINISH SIGN UP' button.
expected_result: The user is directed to the sign-up completion screen.

title: User navigates back to the 'GET CONNECTED' screen after skipping
test_steps: Open the fitness app. | Click on the 'SKIP AND FINISH SIGN UP' button. | Navigate back to the 'GET CONNECTED' screen.

title: User clicks on the 'CONNECT APPS AND DEVICES' button after skipping
test_steps: Open the fitness app. | Click on the 'SKIP AND FINISH SIGN UP' button. | Click on the 'CONNECT APPS AND DEVICES' button.
expected_result: The app transitions to the device and app connection screen.

title: User clicks on the 'CONNECT APPS AND DEVICES' button multiple times
test_steps: Open the fitness app. | Navigate to the 'GET CONNECTED' screen. | Click on the 'CONNECT APPS AND DEVICES' button multiple times.
expected_result: The app transitions to the device and app connection screen each time.

title: User clicks on the 'SKIP AND FINISH SIGN UP' button multiple times
test_steps: Open the fitness app. | Navigate to the 'GET CONNECTED' screen. | Click on the 'SKIP AND FINISH SIGN UP' button multiple times.
expected_result: The user is directed to the sign-up completion screen each time.
